tagline: Standing-seam and panel metal roofing — durable, energy-efficient, beautiful.
metaDescription: Metal roof installation in Los Angeles County — standing-seam, panel, and stone-coated steel. Free inspections. CA Lic. #1109337.
intro_h2: Metal Roofing for Residential and Commercial Buildings
intro: Metal roofing has surged in popularity across California thanks to its 50+ year lifespan, excellent energy efficiency, and modern aesthetic. Palm Crest Roofing installs standing-seam metal, metal shingles, and stone-coated steel across LA County — with the right profile and finish for your home or building.
benefits: Standing-seam, exposed-fastener panel, and stone-coated steel
Cool-roof coatings that lower summer cooling costs
50+ year lifespan — often the last roof a building ever needs
Non-combustible — ideal for LA's wildfire-prone foothills
Wide range of colors and profiles
Proper flashing, underlayment, and ventilation included

process.title: Consultation
process.desc: We walk through metal profiles, colors, and finishes — plus cost comparisons vs. other roofing systems.

process.title: Estimate
process.desc: Written quote including material, labor, trim, flashings, and warranty.

process.title: Substrate Prep
process.desc: Tear off existing roof, inspect and repair deck, install ice-and-water shield and high-temp underlayment.

process.title: Metal Installation
process.desc: Panels installed to manufacturer spec with concealed or exposed fasteners per system chosen.

process.title: Trim & Flashing
process.desc: Ridge, eave, rake, valley, and penetration trim installed and sealed.

faqs.q: Is a metal roof louder in the rain?
faqs.a: No — properly installed metal roofs over a solid deck with underlayment are no louder than asphalt or tile. The 'tin roof in the rain' sound comes from metal over open purlins on barns, not residential installs.

faqs.q: How long does a metal roof last?
faqs.a: 50+ years for standing-seam; 40+ for stone-coated steel. It is often the last roof a home will ever need.

faqs.q: Will metal fit a Spanish-style home?
faqs.a: Stone-coated steel panels can mimic tile or shake profiles and fit traditional California architecture well. We'll show you samples during your free inspection.
